message:
fix: preserve RoleThemes and Custom when saving rig theme (gt-vri31)

saveRigTheme was replacing the entire ThemeConfig struct with a new one
containing only the Name field, which clobbered any existing RoleThemes
map and Custom theme settings. Now updates only the Name field on the
existing ThemeConfig (or creates a new one if nil).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
